top_signals.title: London Traders Are Stuck With an Ultra-Long Bond Bet Gone Bad
top_signals.summary: It was supposed to be a relatively quick and lucrative bet. Buy a long-dated UK government bond at an historic discount to par, wait for the price to pop and then reap a tax-free windfall.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
